steps.title: Refer to one event
steps.content: The blank refers back to the single event of Le Luong Minh becoming ASEAN secretary-general in January 2013. Because the reference is singular and specific, the pronoun must also be singular.

steps.title: Use a singular pronoun
steps.content:
• Choice A: "These" is plural, so it cannot refer to one appointment.
  • Choice B: "Those" is also plural and does not fit the singular event.
  • Choice D: "Some" is indefinite and does not point back to the specific appointment.
The answer is C.
